---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(quantmod)
library(reshape2)
library(tsibble)
library(data.table)
library(ggthemes)
library(lubridate)
library(TTR)
source("/home/marco/trading/Systems//Common/Common.R")
Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", "en_US.UTF-8")
theme_set(theme_bw(base_size = 32))

```

```{r}
setwd("/home/marco/trading/Social/")
dir.create("CommodityCalendar") 
BackAdj <- read_rds("/home/marco/trading/HistoricalData/Barchart/BackAdj.RDS")

```



```{r}
setwd("CommodityCalendar")
res <- list()
for(symbol in names(BackAdj)){
    print(symbol)
    df <- BackAdj[[symbol]] %>% filter(year(Date) > 2010)
    df$Volatility <- calculate_volatility(df$Return)
    df$Return <- df$Return / df$Volatility * sqrt(252) # Seasonality adjusted, comment it if unwanted
    r <- sqrt(nrow(df)/12)*3
    a <- group_by(df, YearMonth=yearmonth(Date)) %>% reframe(YearMonth=first(YearMonth), PnL=sum(replace_na(Return,0))) %>% group_by(Month=month(YearMonth)) %>%  mutate(Eq=cumsum(PnL), Symbol=symbol)
    #p <- a %>% ggplot(aes(YearMonth, Eq, color=Month, group=Month)) + geom_line(size=2, alpha=0.5) +  geom_text(aes(label = Month)) + geom_hline(yintercept = c(-r,r), linetype="dashed") + scale_color_gradient(low = "red", high = "blue") + ylab(symbol)
    #ggsave(filename = paste0(symbol, "_yearly_backtest.png"), p, width=12, height=9,dpi=75)
    res[[symbol]] <- a#df %>% group_by(Month=month(Date), Symbol) %>% reframe(SR = mean(Return, na.rm=T) / sd(Return, na.rm=T) *sqrt(252))
  }
```

```{r}
final <- do.call(rbind, res) %>% group_by(Symbol, Month) %>% slice_tail(n=1)

```
